name: RedPajama-INCITE-7B-Base
note: Fully reproducible 7B trained on 1T RedPajama-1T tokens with 10 released checkpoints, Apache-2.0.

results.notes: LM-eval-harness acc_norm, Table 9 ('LM eval harness results for RedPajama-INCITE-Base-7B-v1 and instruction tuned model') of the official RedPajama technical paper (Together AI et al., NeurIPS 2024 D&B track).
LM-eval-harness acc, Table 9 of the RedPajama technical paper.

LM-eval-harness acc_norm, Table 9. (A separate HELM-classic EM-metric HellaSwag score of 70.2 also appears in Table 8; using the acc_norm figure for consistency with how HellaSwag is scored elsewhere in this corpus.)
LAMBADA-OpenAI acc, Table 9 of the RedPajama technical paper.
PIQA acc_norm, Table 9 of the RedPajama technical paper.
Winogrande acc, Table 9 of the RedPajama technical paper.
HELM OpenbookQA EM score, Table 8 ('HELM Benchmark results for RedPajama-INCITE-Base-7B-v1 and instruction tuned') of the RedPajama technical paper.
HELM TruthfulQA EM score, Table 8 of the RedPajama technical paper.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via together.ai/blog/redpajama-7b (published June 6, 2023): Apache 2.0, 10 intermediate checkpoints released, 1.001T training tokens. HF card confirms '6.9B parameter' count and GPT-NeoX architecture. Fetched arxiv.org/html/2411.12372 directly and confirmed Table 8 verbatim: RedPajama-INCITE-7B-Base 0.431, LLaMA-7B 0.472, Falcon-7B 0.441, MPT-7B 0.444 — exact match to claimed row.
